description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node Docker image and caching the node_modules/ directory. Define a single stage named test. Add a pages job that runs in the test stage, executes `echo "USING PRE-BUILT DOCS"` and `mv docs/ public/`, publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact, and has no branch restrictions. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `yarn install` then `yarn test:no-report`. The pipeline should not define any additional services or rules.
